snippet: The student reporting professional learning program (program) is an online tool which supports teachers and school leaders to strengthen student reporting by engaging in school-based professional learning. The program guides participants through collaborative investigations, analysis of evidence and scaffolds, enabling strategic design, planning and facilitation of the reporting processes.
